initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept this proposal. I must reject it to avoid losing everything. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to accept your trade. I must reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present in the correct order, and the content is valid.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources, there is no possible trade that can be accepted. Rejecting is the only viable option to avoid losing everything.

3. Opponent plausibility: N/A. Player BLUE cannot propose a trade, so this axis is not applicable.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> is consistent with the <player answer> and <newly proposed trade>. The <message> also aligns with the decision to reject.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The response respects the rules, as Player BLUE is on Move 1/4 and is correctly rejecting the trade.
</critique>
